qualifier: [Amory Lorch raided Sow's Horn, slaughtered livestock, attempted to burn Roger in his tower; War of the Five Kings]
evidence_snippet: led by Ser [Amory Lorch](wiki:Amory_Lorch). He slaughtered half of Roger's sheep and three good milk goats, and tried to roast Roger in his tower
evidence_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Feast for Crows

qualifier: [Karstarks came seeking Jaime; Roger's men fought and killed three of them; War of the Five Kings]
evidence_snippet: He tells of the [Karstarks](wiki:House_Karstark) that came looking for Jaime, but he and his men saw them off and buried three of them down by the turnips
evidence_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Feast for Crows

qualifier: [defended Sow's Horn against Karstark and Lannister raiders]
evidence_snippet: Roger tells Jaime of the deprivations and attacks he had suffered during the [War of the Five Kings](wiki:War_of_the_Five_Kings)
evidence_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Feast for Crows
